---
title: "Schedule"
---
::: {.callout-warning}
This website is still under construction! Some sections might be empty. 
:::

| Time |  |
| -------- | ------- |
| 8.35 - 9.15  | An Introduction to MCMC |
| 9.15 -  | The `samplr` package |
| xx | Simulation-based inference |
| xx | Future Directions |
